\tzpentry{ID4409}{Displacement Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4409 introduces Displacement Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K(u,\xi) = \frac{R_{\mu\nu\rho\sigma}\,\xi^\mu u^\nu \xi^\rho u^\sigma}{ (g_{\alpha\beta}\xi^\alpha\xi^\beta)(g_{\gamma\delta}u^\gamma u^\delta) - (g_{\alpha\beta}\xi^\alpha u^\beta)^2 }. \end{equation}
